com.pax.poslink

Class ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
  • Enclosing class:
    ManageRequest

    public static class ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
extends java.lang.Object

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String CollectID
      Is a predefined number specific to the merchant.
      java.lang.String EndTap
      0 - Normal flow if error
      1 - End tap if error
      java.lang.String GoogleSmartTapCap
      Bitmaps for the various capabilities that the ECR supports.
      Please see Google Smart Tap Capabilities Bitmap Definition
      Default value is “00000000000000000000000000000000”
      java.lang.String MerchantCategory
      Digit merchant code referring to the category of the merchant as defined by the networks.
      java.lang.String MerchantName
      Merchant name
      java.lang.String OseToPpse
      0 - Normal flow (default)
      1 - Stop vas and do payment directly
      java.lang.String Security
      Security:
      java.lang.String ServiceType
      Please refer to Google Service Type Bitmap Definition
      Default value is “1000000000000000”
      java.lang.String StoreLocalID
      Merchant address code
      java.lang.String TerminalID
      Merchant terminal code

    • Field Detail

      • GoogleSmartTapCap

        public java.lang.String GoogleSmartTapCap
        Bitmaps for the various capabilities that the ECR supports.
        Please see Google Smart Tap Capabilities Bitmap Definition
        Default value is “00000000000000000000000000000000”

        Attribute: n32

      • CollectID

        public java.lang.String CollectID
        Is a predefined number specific to the merchant.

        Attribute: n8

      • StoreLocalID

        public java.lang.String StoreLocalID
        Merchant address code

        Attribute: ans...32

      • TerminalID

        public java.lang.String TerminalID
        Merchant terminal code

        Attribute: ans...32

      • MerchantName

        public java.lang.String MerchantName
        Merchant name

        Attribute: ans...32

      • MerchantCategory

        public java.lang.String MerchantCategory
        Digit merchant code referring to the category of the merchant as defined by the networks.

        Attribute: ans...32

      • ServiceType

        public java.lang.String ServiceType
        Please refer to Google Service Type Bitmap Definition
        Default value is “1000000000000000”

        Attribute: n16

      • Security

        public java.lang.String Security
        Security:

        0 - Normal
        1 - Securely
        2 - Pre_signature
        3 - Need not a right auth.

        Attribute: n1

      • EndTap

        public java.lang.String EndTap
        0 - Normal flow if error
        1 - End tap if error

        Attribute: n1

      • OseToPpse

        public java.lang.String OseToPpse
        0 - Normal flow (default)
        1 - Stop vas and do payment directly

        Attribute: n1
